chapter_title.ar: باب التُّرْبَةِ الَّتِي يُدْفَنُ فِيهَا الْمَيِّتُ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 69 – The soil in which the deceased is buried

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (4/120)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (4/120)
text: مَنْ خُلِقَ مِنْ تُرْبَةٍ دُفِنَ فِيهَا .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Isa, from Ibn Muskan, from Muhammad Bin Muslim,
from one of the two (5<sup>th</sup> or 6<sup>th</sup> Imam<sup>asws</sup>) having said: ‘The one who is Created from the soil, is buried in it’.
en.sarwar: 1. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn ‘Isa from ibn Muskan from Muhammad ibn Muslim who has said the following: “One of the two Imam, ‘Alayhim al-Salam, has said, ’From whatever soil one is created in that soil one is buried also.’”
